zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE於大約1240年出生在法國諾門迪艾斯陶迪維爾時，他的父親Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont24歲，母親Jeanne Talbot23歲。他和Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1304年5月20日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE于大约1240年出生在法国諾門迪艾斯陶迪維爾时，他的父亲Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont24岁，母亲Jeanne Talbot23岁。他和Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1304年5月20日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE was born about 1240, in Estouteville, Normandy, France, his father, Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont, was 24 and his mother, Jeanne Talbot, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. He died before 20 May 1304.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE est né environ 1240, à Estouteville, Normandie, France, son père, Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Talbot, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. Il est décédé avant 20 mai 1304.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE um 1240 in Estouteville, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont 24 und seine Mutter Jeanne Talbot 23. Er hatte mit Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. Mai 1304.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE è nato il circa 1240 nel Estouteville, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Talbot, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. Morì prima del 20 maggio 1304.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLEが約1240年にフランスノーマンディエストウテヴィルで生まれた時，父Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmontは24歳，母Jeanne Talbotは23歳であった。彼はJeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBECとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1304年5月20日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 노먼디 에스토우테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Talbot(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 5월 20일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Estouteville, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Talbot, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. Ele faleceu antes 20 de maio de 1304.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE родился около 1240 г. в местности эстоутевилл, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Talbot, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. Он умер перед 20 май 1304 г.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC. Murió antes de 20 de mayo de 1304.
